steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The structure “which is an _____ number to feel confident” links a property of the sample size directly to confidence in the rating. The blank must name what makes 9,000 justify that confidence.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The target meaning is sufficient or enough—and “adequate” expresses this precisely, as it means sufficient for a purpose.

Here, 9,000 is adequate for justifying confidence in the average rating.
The other choices don't fit: “insufficient” contradicts the logic, “excessive” wrongly suggests too much, and “accurate” addresses rating quality rather than sample size.
This matches choice D — D is correct.
